text: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 WSJ: The Pentagon officials briefed President Trump on a draft of a defense strategy document, which framed China as the top security threat facing the U.S. However, Trump ordered his Pentagon deputy to rewrite it, resulting in a revised National Defense Strategy with a conciliatory tone toward Beijing. The revised document declares that President Trump seeks a stable peace, fair trade, and respectful relations with China, discarding a policy that was formulated by his first administration, which characterised China as the most consequential U.S. adversary in a new approach to China. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇳 🇺🇸 《华尔街日报》：五角大楼官员向特朗普总统简要介绍了国防战略文件草案，该草案将中国列为美国面临的首要安全威胁。然而，特朗普命令其国防部副部长重写该文件，最终形成了一份对北京态度较为缓和的修订版《国防战略》。修订后的文件宣称，特朗普总统寻求与中国建立稳定的和平、公平的贸易和相互尊重的关系，摒弃了其第一任期内制定的将中国视为美国最重要对手的对华方针。 @wfwitness

text: ❗️ White House aides got an email last month telling them not to place bets on prediction markets, multiple sources told @CBSNews . Press reports had raised concerns about govt officials using nonpublic info to place wagers on Kalshi and Polymarket, said the email, from White House Management Office. The warning reminded staff that's a criminal offense, and is also prohibited by govt ethics regulations. "All White House employees are reminded that the misuse of nonpublic information by government employees for financial benefit is a very serious offense and will not be tolerated."
text_zh: ❗️ 多位消息人士告诉 @CBSNews，白宫助手上个月收到一封电子邮件，被告知不得在预测市场上进行投注。白宫管理办公室发出的这封邮件称，新闻报道引发了人们对政府官员利用非公开信息在 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 上进行投注的担忧。该警告提醒员工，这属于刑事犯罪，也违反了政府道德法规。“提醒所有白宫员工，政府雇员滥用非公开信息以谋取经济利益是非常严重的违法行为，绝不容忍。”

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 U.S army survivor of the deadliest Iranian attack on U.S. forces since the war began disputed the Pentagon's description of events. He stated their unit in Kuwait was left exposed. The survivor spoke on the condition of anonymity because they were not authorized to speak to the media, he gave the interview without official permission from the U.S. Military.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 自战争开始以来，在伊朗对美军发动的最致命袭击中幸存的一名美国士兵对五角大楼的事件描述提出了质疑。他表示，他们驻科威特的部队处于毫无防备的状态。由于未获授权向媒体发言，这名幸存者在匿名的情况下接受了采访，他在未获得美国军方官方许可的情况下接受了这次采访。

text: 🇺🇸 🛢 📈 📉 🏴‍☠️ 💰 The White House urged employees to refrain from using their official positions to participate in futures trading, writes The Wall Street Journal. According to its sources, on March 23, a few minutes before Trump announced the suspension of strikes on Iran's power plants and infrastructure, oil futures transactions worth more than $760 million were carried out. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🛢 📈 📉 🏴‍☠️ 💰 《华尔街日报》报道称，白宫敦促员工不要利用职务之便参与期货交易。据其消息来源，3月23日，在特朗普宣布暂停对伊朗发电厂和基础设施的打击前几分钟，价值超过7.6亿美元的石油期货交易被执行。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor RT @phildstewart : “The Court cannot conclude this Opinion without noting once again what this case is really about: the attempt by the Secretary of Defense to dictate the information received by the American people, to control the message so that the public hears and sees only what the Secretary and the Trump Administration want them to hear and see. The Constitution demands better. The American public demands better, too.” https://www.reuters.com/world/us-judge-orders-pentagon-restore-press-access-2026-04-09 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @phildstewart：“法院在结束本意见书时，必须再次指出本案的真正核心：国防部长试图左右美国人民接收的信息，控制舆论，使公众只能听到和看到国防部长及特朗普政府希望他们听到和看到的内容。宪法要求做得更好。美国公众也要求做得更好。” https://www.reuters.com/world/us-judge-orders-pentagon-restore-press-access-2026-04-09 推文

text: OSINTdefender On Thursday, a total of six ships traveled through the Strait of Hormuz, a one ship increase since Wednesday but still significantly lower than averages seen prior to the Iran War, with today’s transits including two oil, chemical or liquid natural gas tankers, three cargo ships, and one bunkering tanker, according to data provided to CBS News by the global ship tracking firm MarineTraffic. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据全球船舶追踪公司 MarineTraffic 提供给 CBS 新闻的数据，周四共有六艘船只通过了霍尔木兹海峡，比周三增加了一艘，但仍远低于伊朗战争前观察到的平均水平。今天的过境船只包括两艘油轮、化学品或液化天然气运输船，三艘货船和一艘加油船。 推文

text: OSINTtechnical China pushed Iran towards a ceasefire in order to score diplomatic capital with the Trump administration, and hopes to use that credit to begin shifting U.S. policy toward the position that Taiwan is a "breakaway province that should reunite with the mainland" -WSJ tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 中国推动伊朗实现停火是为了在特朗普政府那里积累外交资本，并希望利用这些信誉开始推动美国政策转向，即台湾是“应该与大陆统一的分离省份” - 《华尔街日报》推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 WSJ: U.S. President Trump raised concerns in a phone call with Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu, that one official described as shorter than usual, that intensified Israeli strikes against Hezbollah could jeopardise the fragile ceasefire with Iran and efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Trump told Netanyahu that he knows that Israel has a right to defend itself, but that he should tone down the airstrikes to support the ceasefire. U.S. officials fear that Iran may leverage Israeli strikes on Lebanon to get more out of the U.S. to keep the ceasefire on track during negotiations in Islamabad this weekend. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 《华尔街日报》：美国总统特朗普在与以色列总理内塔尼亚胡的通话中表达了担忧，一位官员称这次通话比平时更短，称以色列对真主党加强打击可能会危及与伊朗脆弱的停火以及重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的努力。特朗普告诉内塔尼亚胡，他知道以色列有权自卫，但他应该缓和空袭以支持停火。美国官员担心，伊朗可能会利用以色列对黎巴嫩的打击，在周末于伊斯兰堡举行的谈判中从美国那里获得更多筹码以维持停火。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reports of multiple explosions in Tehran accompanied by anti aircraft fire. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 有报道称德黑兰发生多起爆炸，并伴有防空炮火。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israel launched airstrikes against Al-Sultaniyah, Bint Jbeil district, in southern Lebanon this Thursday evening. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列本周四晚对黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒区的苏尔塔尼亚（Al-Sultaniyah）发动了空袭。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli jets over Beirut and its suburbs including keserwan-Jounieh district. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列战机飞越贝鲁特及其郊区，包括凯塞鲁万-朱尼耶区。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇨🇺🇺🇸Cuban President Canel Diaz on if he would step down from his position if requested by the U.S.: "In Cuba, the people who are in leadership position is not elected by the US government, and they don't have a mandate from the US government. We have…" ⚡️ 🇨🇺 Cuban President Canel Diaz indicated that he would be willing to step down if the Cuban people found him unfit for office. "Concept of revolutionaries giving up and stepping down is not part of our vocabulary. If the Cuban people understand that I am not fit for office, that I am not rising to the occasion, then I should not be holding this position of president. I will respond to them." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇨🇺🇺🇸古巴总统卡内尔·迪亚斯在被问及如果美国要求他是否会辞职时表示：‘在古巴，担任领导职务的人不是由美国政府选举产生的，他们也没有美国政府的授权。我们有……’” ⚡️ 🇨🇺 古巴总统卡内尔·迪亚斯表示，如果古巴人民认为他不适合担任公职，他愿意辞职。“革命者放弃和辞职的概念不在我们的词汇中。如果古巴人民认为我不适合担任公职，认为我无法胜任，那么我就不应该担任总统这个职位。我会对他们负责。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇺 🇺🇸 Cuban President Canel Diaz on if he would step down from his position if requested by the U.S.: "In Cuba, the people who are in leadership position is not elected by the US government, and they don't have a mandate from the US government. We have a free sovereign state, a free state. We have self determination and independence, and we are not subjected to the designs of The United States. On the other hand, Cuban leaders are not here representing an elite of power. You can see my background where I was born, my family, what I've done throughout my life. We are elected by the people. Although there's a narrative trying to disregard that." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇺 🇺🇸 古巴总统卡内尔·迪亚斯在被问及如果美国要求他是否会辞职时表示：“在古巴，担任领导职务的人不是由美国政府选举产生的，他们也没有美国政府的授权。我们拥有一个自由的主权国家，一个自由的国家。我们拥有自决权和独立，我们不受美国的设计所左右。另一方面，古巴领导人在这里并不代表权力精英。你可以看看我的背景，我出生在哪里，我的家庭，我一生所做的事情。我们是由人民选举产生的。尽管有一种叙事试图无视这一点。” @wfwitness

text: The Spectator Index The Democratic Party now has a 86% chance of winning the US House of Representatives, according to prediction market @Kalshi . https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042404350778360058/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 根据预测市场 @Kalshi 的数据，民主党现在有 86% 的机会赢得美国众议院。 https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042404350778360058/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Ship traffic through Strait of Hormuz is still 'well below 10% of normal volumes' according to Reuters report tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 突发：据路透社报道，通过霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通量仍“远低于正常水平的 10%”。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 CBS: A U.S. injured in the Iranian drone strike that killed six U.S. personnel in Kuwait said that the unit was unprepared to provide and defense for itself in an unfortified position, rejecting U.S, Secretary of War Hegseth's characterzing the drone as one that squirted through defences. About a week before Operation Epic Fury was launched, personnel from the Army's 103rd Sustained Command were relocated to the Port of Shuaiba, which was only protected by concrete walls capable of stopping mortars or rockets, but no protection from aerial attacks. One soldier reports seeing intelligence that the site was one of Iran's potential targets in the region. One of the injured soldiers said that the attack was preventable. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 🇮🇷 CBS：一名在伊朗无人机袭击中受伤的美国士兵（该袭击造成六名美军人员在科威特死亡）表示，该部队在毫无防备的阵地上无法提供防御，拒绝了美国战争部长赫格塞斯将该无人机描述为“漏网之鱼”的说法。在“史诗愤怒行动”（Operation Epic Fury）发起前约一周，陆军第103维持司令部的人员被重新部署到舒艾巴港，该港口仅由能抵御迫击炮或火箭弹的混凝土墙保护，但对空中袭击毫无防护。一名士兵报告称看到情报显示该地点是伊朗在该地区的潜在目标之一。一名受伤士兵表示，这次袭击是可以预防的。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Just so we understand who we are dealing with: These Islamic fanatics are ready to throw away a U.S. off-ramp to end this war. Not for the Iranian people. Not for the Lebanese people. For a radical terror proxy in Lebanon that calls itself Hezbollah. They will always choose continued destruction over peace. Every time. For what? A terror group that has nothing to do with the Iranian people. In no way shape or form should President Trump bow down to this Islamic regime demand. Separate Lebanon from IRGC immediately. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 为了让我们了解我们正在与谁打交道：这些伊斯兰狂热分子准备放弃美国提供的结束这场战争的退路。不是为了伊朗人民。不是为了黎巴嫩人民。而是为了黎巴嫩境内一个自称真主党的激进恐怖代理人。他们总是会选择持续的破坏而不是和平。每一次都是这样。为了什么？一个与伊朗人民毫无关系的恐怖组织。特朗普总统绝不应该向这个伊斯兰政权的要求低头。立即将黎巴嫩与伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）分开。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷WSJ: The Iranian delegation has arrived in Islamabad for negotiations with the U.S. this weekend. The delegation is led by Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi and Iranian Parliament speaker Ghalibaf. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 Fars: An Iranian official denied that an Iranian delegation has arrived in Islamabad for negotiations. The official clarified that Iran has no intention in negotiating with the U.S. until Lebanon is included in the ceasefire agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷《华尔街日报》：伊朗代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡，将于本周末与美国进行谈判。代表团由伊朗外交部长阿拉格希和伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫率领。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇱🇧 法尔斯通讯社：一名伊朗官员否认伊朗代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡进行谈判。该官员澄清说，在黎巴嫩被纳入停火协议之前，伊朗无意与美国进行谈判。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 "I know why Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens, and Alex Jones have all been fighting me for years, especially by the fact that they think it is wonderful for Iran, the Number One State Sponsor of Terror, to have a Nuclear Weapon - Because they…" 🇺🇸 Alex Jones comments on Trump's wall of text post today, where he attacked him, Tucker Carson and others that helped get him elected. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 ‘我知道为什么塔克·卡尔森、梅根·凯利、坎迪斯·欧文斯和亚历克斯·琼斯多年来一直与我作对，特别是他们认为伊朗这个头号恐怖主义支持国拥有核武器是一件美妙的事情——因为他们……’” 🇺🇸 亚历克斯·琼斯评论了特朗普今天发布的长文，他在文中攻击了琼斯、塔克·卡尔森和其他帮助他当选的人。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷Islamabad's Serena Hotel has been requsitioned by the Pakistani government until Sunday evening. This is likely the venue for negotiations between the U.S. and Iran this weekend. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The Iranian delegation has arrived in Islamabad for negotiations with the U.S. this weekend. The delegation is led by Iranian Foreign Minister Araghchi and Iranian Parliament speaker Ghalibaf. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷伊斯兰堡的塞雷纳酒店已被巴基斯坦政府征用至周日晚上。这很可能是本周末美伊谈判的地点。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：伊朗代表团已抵达伊斯兰堡，将于本周末与美国进行谈判。代表团由伊朗外交部长阿拉格希和伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫率领。 @wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇮🇷 NEW: About two hours ago, an LPG tanker attempted to cross the Strait of Hormuz, but was turned away by the IRGC Navy @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇮🇷 最新消息：大约两小时前，一艘液化石油气（LPG）油轮试图穿过霍尔木兹海峡，但被伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军驱离 @Middle_East_Spectator
